hero.title: Empowering Ethiopian Trade.
hero.subtitle: KuntalX connects farmer associations with buyers through verified digital aggregation — transparent, fair, and fully traceable.

about.title: A Platform Built for Ethiopian Agriculture.
about.body: KuntalX is a digital marketplace that bridges the gap between farmer associations and buyers across Ethiopia. Associations create aggregation campaigns, collecting produce contributions from their member farmers. Each contribution is digitally recorded, weighed, and quality graded at collection hubs. Once a pool is ready, it becomes visible to verified buyers on the marketplace — who can browse available lots, review quality grades, and place orders directly. When a sale is completed, payouts flow automatically and transparently to every contributing farmer based on their share. KuntalX removes the middleman, eliminates information asymmetry, and brings financial clarity to Ethiopia's agricultural trade — from the farm gate to the buyer's door.

directMarket.title: Direct Market Access
directMarket.desc: Buyers discover and purchase graded produce directly from verified farmer associations — no intermediaries.

digitalAggregation.title: Digital Aggregation
digitalAggregation.desc: Associations create pooling campaigns. Farmers contribute their harvest, building buyer-ready lots.

liveInventory.title: Live Inventory Tracking
liveInventory.desc: See real-time availability across all active aggregation pools with contribution-level detail.

verifiedSettlements.title: Verified Payouts
verifiedSettlements.desc: When a buyer purchases, farmers automatically receive their share — transparent and verified.

logisticsTransparency.title: Full Traceability
logisticsTransparency.desc: Every contribution is logged: which farmer, which weight, which grade, all the way to the buyer.

flexibleTrading.title: Two-Sided Marketplace
flexibleTrading.desc: Purpose-built for farmer associations supplying produce and buyers procuring at scale.

impact.title: Nationwide Networks.
impact.subtitle: Connecting every region of Ethiopia through a decentralized grid of verified agricultural nodes.

stats.farmersDesc: Directly connected to the digital backbone.

registration.title: Pool is Created

pooling.title: Farmers Contribute
pooling.desc: Farmers add their harvest to the pool; each contribution is weighed and recorded.

matching.title: Quality Grading

logistics.title: Buyer Purchases

payouts.title: Secure Payouts
payouts.desc: Once sold, each contributing farmer automatically receives their verified payout.

item1.name: Abebe Tadesse
item1.quote: KuntalX has revolutionized how we aggregate our coffee. For the first time, our members see the real market price before the sale.

item2.name: Dr. Selamawit K.
item2.quote: The digital quality grading is a game changer for our processing factory. We can now plan our production cycles with verified supply data.

whyKuntalX.title: Built for Farmers, Loved by Buyers.

faq.title: Common Questions.
faq.q1: How does KuntalX ensure fair pricing?
faq.a1: We provide real-time market indices directly to the farm gate, bypassing intermediary price-fixing and ensuring associations trade at current regional benchmarks.
faq.a2: Primarily high-bulk cereals, oilseeds, and coffee. Our system is designed for any crop that requires centralized grading and aggregation.
faq.q3: How secure is the digital payment system?
faq.a3: Every payment is tied directly to a verified digital delivery receipt, using a multi-sig verification process between the hub manager and the buyer.

form.name: Full Name
form.placeholderMessage: Tell us about your trading needs...

newsletter.title: Stay In the Market Cycle.
newsletter.desc: Get weekly insights on regional commodity prices and operational hub status directly to your terminal.

step1.title: Association Opens Pool
step1.desc: An association creates an aggregation campaign, defining the crop type, target volume, and collection period.

step2.title: Farmers Contribute
step2.desc: Member farmers submit their harvested produce. Each contribution is digitally logged — farmer, weight, and date.

step3.title: Quality Grading
step3.desc: Collected produce is inspected and graded. Verified grade data is attached to the pool before it goes live.

step4.title: Buyer Purchases
step4.desc: Buyers browse the marketplace, select a graded lot, and place their order. Payouts flow automatically to contributing farmers.

marketplace.title: Browse, Buy, Done.
marketplace.subtitle: Buyers see verified, graded lots in real time. Every lot shows the association, crop type, quantity, and quality grade — before you commit.

footer.desc: The digital highway for Ethiopia's agricultural expansion. We are building the infrastructure for transparent, secure, and industrial-scale commodity aggregation.
